# Data Scrubbing

Please refer to [the SDK documentation for a general introduction to managing sensitive data](https://docs.sentry.io/platform-redirect.md?next=/data-management/sensitive-data/). This page documents only the server-side options.

* #### [Server-Side Data Scrubbing](https://docs.sentry.io/security-legal-pii/scrubbing/server-side-scrubbing.md)

  Learn about the data scrubbing Sentry enables by default.

* #### [Advanced Data Scrubbing](https://docs.sentry.io/security-legal-pii/scrubbing/advanced-datascrubbing.md)

  Learn about using Advanced Data Scrubbing as an alternative way to redact sensitive information just before it is saved in Sentry.

* #### [Attachment Scrubbing](https://docs.sentry.io/security-legal-pii/scrubbing/attachment-scrubbing.md)

  Learn about scrubbing attachments if they contain PII.

* #### [Protecting User Privacy in Session Replay](https://docs.sentry.io/security-legal-pii/scrubbing/protecting-user-privacy.md)

  Learn about how Session Replay captures data while protecting user privacy.

* #### [Restricting Data Display](https://docs.sentry.io/security-legal-pii/scrubbing/restrict-display.md)

  Learn about enhanced privacy controls for email notifications.

- [Server-Side Data Scrubbing](https://docs.sentry.io/security-legal-pii/scrubbing/server-side-scrubbing.md)

- [Restricting Data Display](https://docs.sentry.io/security-legal-pii/scrubbing/restrict-display.md)
